reasoning: The control RA-5-a focuses on monitoring and scanning for vulnerabilities, which can be mapped to Kubernetes in terms of ensuring that container images are scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment and continuously monitored. This involves integrating image vulnerability scanning tools and admission controllers to enforce scanning policies. Additionally, ensuring that pods are configured to use images that have been scanned and are free from known vulnerabilities aligns with this control.
title: Vulnerability Monitoring And Scanning - Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities...
